title: Digest: AI productivity in product management
thesis: AI is shifting PM leverage from drafting volume toward synthesis quality, decision clarity, and trusted operating rhythm.

relevant_claims.statement: PMs adopting AI still struggle to trust outputs that do not show evidence and rationale.
relevant_claims.relevance: Supports a trust-led day-1 positioning wedge.

reusable_assets: Chart showing time spent on synthesis versus decision making.
strategic_implications: ProductOS should package research and evidence visibly from the first interaction.
Day-1 value should combine speed with confidence, not speed alone.
contradictions: Some respondents value raw drafting speed more than visible traceability.
caveats: Report sample skews toward larger product organizations.
